---
title: "B1.4 –– Introduction to Linguistics"
subtitle: "Academic Year: 2083"
format: html
author: ""
---

::: {.callout-note collapse=false}
## 📢 News flash

(2026.05.24)

<!-- - [🗓️ Week 01 lecture material](/2083/weeks/week01/page.qmd) is now available! -->
New site is just launched!

:::


# 🧑🏻‍🏫 Instructor

::: {.panel-tabset}
## 

![](/figures/people/pratik.jpg){fig-align="left" fig-alt="Photo of Dr. Pratik Bhandari" style="object-fit: cover;width:5em;height:5em;border-radius: 50%;"}
<br>**[Dr. Pratik Bhandari](https://pratikb.com)** <br/>
Research Scientist <br/>
[Nepal Center for Cognition and Society (NCCS)](https://nccs-nepal.github.io/)</a><br/>
<!-- 📧 [MY_EMAIL](mailto:) -->


<!-- ## Teaching Staff

![](/figures/people/ta_octopunian.png){fig-align="left" fig-alt="Photo of TA_NAME" style="object-fit: cover;width:5em;height:5em;border-radius: 50%;"}  
**[TA_NAME](#)** <br/>
PhD Candidate at PLACE <br> 
📧 [EMAIL](mailto:) -->

:::

# 📍 Lecture

::: {style="display:inline-block;width: 28.5%;border-style: dotted;border-width: 1px;border-color: &quot;#fefefe&quot;; margin:1%;padding:1.5%;background-color:#fafafa"}
**Day 01**

- 📆 Mondays
- ⌚ 13:30 - 14:30
- 📍 Bir Hospital 
:::

::: {style="display:inline-block;width: 28.5%;border-style: dotted;border-width: 1px;border-color: &quot;#fefefe&quot;; margin:1%;padding:1.5%;background-color:#fafafa"}
**Day 02**

- 📆 Tuesdays
- ⌚ 14:00 - 15:00
- 📍 Bir Hospital 
            
:::
